sourceAmbiguity: Operators could remember event subscriptions loosely and miss mandatory callback classes.
decisionTaken: Exact telephony, SMS, and email event rows are published in data/analysis/203_event_subscription_matrix.csv and validated.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Phase 2 needs call-status, recording-status, continuation, and message-delivery truth to converge into canonical projections.
operationalRisk: Missing event subscriptions can strand recordings, hide delivery failures, or produce contradictory request status.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Update the matrix and validator when providers rename events or introduce a stronger authoritative delivery event.
